div.h1: IOCTL RESIZE Under Mutex: Pre-Alloc Pattern
div.p: Target: mydevice_ioctl_resize(unsigned long arg) Design Rule: Allocate memory before acquiring mutex to avoid sleeping while holding locks.

ul.li: ⚠️ Error Path: Must clean up pre-allocs

div.p: Intel Guideline: GFP_KERNEL allows the allocator to sleep/reclaim. Never call inside mutex!
